title: HEXA-WEAVE MVP W7 — lean4 axiom step-down decomposition (Foundation/Axioms.lean)
task_label: cycle 9 / fan-out 2/5 W7 lean4 axiom step-down (orthogonal to rejected cycle 8 fan-out 2/5 Felgner full proof)
scope: Decompose two largest monolithic axioms in N6/MechVerif/Foundation/Axioms.lean (axiom_strand_zfc_witness, axiom_hexa_comp_closure_via_ZFC) into 5+4 named sub-axioms following the Felgner step1/2/3 pattern from cycle 8. Felgner-related axioms intentionally untouched to avoid proximity to the rejected cycle 8 fan-out 2/5 full-proof track. Sorry count preserved at 0; main PASS theorems preserved unchanged.

parent_witness.cycle_6: W3 clone+VRAM spec + W4 MKBridge.lean (4-axiom monolithic)
parent_witness.cycle_8_w6_3of5: Foundation/Axioms.lean shared-file refactor (7 axioms, F-W5-AX2-1 RESOLVED)

A_strand_zfc_witness.derived_theorem: noncomputable def axiom_strand_zfc_witness : Strand → ZFSet.{0} (pattern-match dispatch)

subaxioms_post.name: axiom_hexa_comp_strand_op_well_defined
subaxioms_post.subproperty: binary op is total on Strand carrier

subaxioms_post.name: axiom_hexa_comp_closure_atom
subaxioms_post.subproperty: atomic-inhabitation retention (cannot be eliminated until ClosedUnderHEXAComp gets a non-opaque definition; W6+ AX-3/AX-4)

C_hexa_comp_closure_via_ZFC.derived_theorem: theorem axiom_hexa_comp_closure_via_ZFC : ClosedUnderHEXAComp Strand (combines C.1-C.4 True placeholders + C.atom)
C_hexa_comp_closure_via_ZFC.honest_caveat: Opaque ClosedUnderHEXAComp prevents full derivation from True placeholders alone. C.atom retains the irreducible inhabitation content. C.1-C.4 are documentation surrogates contributing zero proof-theoretic strength.

newly_derived_theorems: axiom_felgner_1971_conservativity_meta (was already a derived theorem in cycle 8)
axiom_strand_zfc_witness (cycle 9: was monolithic axiom; now noncomputable def dispatching to A.1-A.5)
axiom_hexa_comp_closure_via_ZFC (cycle 9: was monolithic axiom; now theorem combining C.1-C.4 + C.atom)

rfl_proofs_preserved_via_definitional_un: MKBridge.StrandClass_ZFC.exhibits_each (5 rfl proofs, one per constructor)

raw_71_falsifiers.title: axiom_strand_zfc_witness is now noncomputable def, not axiom
raw_71_falsifiers.impact: Tooling that introspects ConstantInfo.axiom would see it as def
raw_71_falsifiers.mitigation: No such tooling currently in repo; flagged for future cycles introducing axiom-graph extraction

raw_71_falsifiers.title: axiom_hexa_comp_closure_atom is renamed retention of prior monolithic axiom
raw_71_falsifiers.impact: Greps for axiom_hexa_comp_closure_via_ZFC as literal axiom now find theorem instead
raw_71_falsifiers.mitigation: Identifier preserved; behavior unchanged for inhabitation purposes

raw_71_falsifiers.title: C.1-C.4 sub-axioms are : True placeholders with content in docstrings only
raw_71_falsifiers.impact: Sub-axioms contribute zero proof-theoretic strength; step-down is a PATTERN not a PROOF
raw_71_falsifiers.mitigation: raw 91 C3 honest disclosure in proposal §4 and §8; future cycles must replace : True with meaningful propositions once HEXA-COMP is defined

raw_71_falsifiers.title: 5 strand_zfc_witness sub-axioms have no consistency relation among them
raw_71_falsifiers.impact: Two distinct constructors encoding the same intuitive object yield different ZFSets (preserved from pre-cycle-9, but more visible)
raw_71_falsifiers.mitigation: Same property as monolithic axiom; flagged for W7+ extensionality work

raw_71_falsifiers.title: Audit pipelines counting #axioms as quality metric will see jump 7 → 15
raw_71_falsifiers.impact: Misinterpretation if #axioms is taken as quality signal without axiom-size weighting
raw_71_falsifiers.mitigation: Intended interpretation: smaller surface area per axiom, not fewer axioms; documented in proposal §3 and §8

honest_disclosure_raw_91_C3.claim: This cycle is a step-down PATTERN applied to two monolithic axioms. No new theorems are proved; no axiomatic content is reduced. The 5+4+1 sub-axioms are smaller surface area each, but together carry the same total content as the prior 1+1 monolithic axioms, plus 4 True placeholder sub-axioms documenting structural sub-properties.
explicit_non_attempts: did NOT attempt Felgner Hauptsatz internal proof
did NOT touch the axiom_felgner_bridge_to_MK signature
did NOT introduce Encodable Strand instance
did NOT modify AX1.lean / AX2.lean / MKBridge.lean / Foundation/Strand.lean
did NOT attempt to derive ClosedUnderHEXAComp Strand from True placeholders alone (impossible due to opaque type)

f_d_3_reassessment.rationale: Decomposition is structural; no semantic change to F-D-3 evaluation.
